mapper.sql: pet.employee_id as pe_id, pet.title_level, pet.title_name, pet.evaluation_time, pet.new_title_flag, pet.attribute1, pet.attribute2, pet.attribute3, pet.enabled_flag, pet.id, pet.create_time, pet.create_by, pet.update_time, pet.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.title_level as ${tAlias}_title_level, ${tAlias}.title_name as ${tAlias}_title_name, ${tAlias}.evaluation_time as ${tAlias}_evaluation_time, ${tAlias}.new_title_flag as ${tAlias}_new_title_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_title (employee_id, title_level, title_name, evaluation_time, new_title_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{titleLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{titleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evaluationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{newTitleFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_title set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title_level = #{titleLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title_name = #{titleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, evaluation_time = #{evaluationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, new_title_flag = #{newTitleFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select peti.employee_id as pe_id, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, peti.title_level) > 0 then peti.title_level else null end as title_level, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, peti.title_name) > 0 then peti.title_name else null end as title_name from pm_employee_title peti join pm_employee pe on pe.id = peti.employee_id where peti.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and concat( peti.title_level,peti.title_name ) like '%' + #{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR} + '%'
mapper.sql:
select
,
from pm_employee_title pet left join pm_employee_title_temp pett on pet.id = pett.title_id and pett.enabled_flag = 1 and pett.check_flag = 'D' and pett.instructions_flag = 'U'
